name: Platform-Neutral Authentication Standards
consequences: Immediate: Formalizing open-standard authentication requirements → Systemic: 25% reduction in platform-specific dependency metrics within 18 months → Strategic: Establishes irreversible technical precedent for supplier diversification. Controls technical innovation vs. institutional inertia. Weakness: The options fail to account for legacy system retrofit costs.
options: Adopt FIDO2/WebAuthn as mandatory baseline for all public-sector identity systems
Create hybrid authentication frameworks combining open standards with proprietary fallbacks
Implement blockchain-based decentralized identifiers (DIDs) for platform-neutral verification
review: Controls technical innovation vs. institutional inertia. Weakness: The options fail to account for legacy system retrofit costs.
